name: Saurian Spike (Greater)
description:
This jagged, bony growth narrows to a sharp, pointed tip. Deep groves from some former battle scar its surface. The bearer of a saurian spike often feels a sudden surge in power and confidence. The spell attack modifier of any spell cast by activating this item is +18.

  • Armor You gain imprecise scent with a range of 60 feet.
  • Weapon (auditory, emotion, fear, visual) When you cast a polymorph spell by activating the spike, your battle form is exceptionally fearsome. Each enemy in a must succeed at a saving throw or become Frightened 1 (Frightened 2 on a critical failure).

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You cast .

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast 5th-rank .
